steps.title: Distribute and combine like terms
steps.content: Distribute the negative sign across the second polynomial:$$=3x^3-4x+9-6x^6-8x+4$$$$=-6x^6+3x^3-12x+13$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The simplified expression is $-6x^6+3x^3-12x+13$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
